notes: SRD environmental hazards. Saves use {ability, dc}. Damage is optional. Effect on fail / success encoded as semantic tokens consumed by ai_dm.rules.hazards.resolve_tick.

hazards.name: Extreme Cold
hazards.description: A creature exposed to extreme cold (below 0°F) for 1 hour without protection must succeed on a DC 10 Con save or gain a level of exhaustion.

hazards.name: Extreme Heat
hazards.description: A creature in temperatures above 100°F must succeed on a Con save (DC 5, +5 per previous hour) at the end of each hour or gain a level of exhaustion.

hazards.name: High Altitude
hazards.description: Travelling above 10,000 ft each hour counts as 2 hours; after 30 days a creature becomes acclimated.

hazards.name: Suffocation
hazards.description: A creature can hold its breath for 1+Con-mod minutes (min 30 sec). When out of breath it drops to 0 HP at the start of its next turn.

hazards.name: Falling
hazards.description: 1d6 bludgeoning per 10 ft fallen, max 20d6; creature lands prone unless it took 0 damage.

hazards.name: Lava
hazards.description: 10d10 fire damage per round of immersion.

hazards.name: Drowning
hazards.description: When a creature runs out of breath underwater it drops to 0 HP and starts dying.
